title: Tarot Board
description: Tarot board is a card game called "Fairy Chess Pieces"
body:
<center>

# Welcome to Tarot Board

</center>

This is playing card mod with what I call fairy cards (see the definition of
 "fairy chess pieces".), this mod provides over 3000 playing cards and 
some poker chips 😄

Name comes from Mysticpasta1's game on gamejolt.
The goal is to have fun with friend with the playing cards.

~Mysticpasta1

<center>

## HotKey for the following actions

</center>

When you are looking at the DECK: 
- **LMB** = shuffle the DECK 
- **RMB** = Take a card from the DECK
- **SHIFT + LMB** = Pick up the DECK (will also gather all of the placed cards, too)

When you are looking at the CARD:
- **LMB** = Flip the card
- **RMB** = Place the card or Pick up the card
